prompt: Use the autodl skill to incrementally push my local ./runs directory to an elastic container over SSH, but do not call live APIs. Show the command only.

rubric.criterion: Recognizes sync is rclone-over-SSH, not a public-repo intermediary.
Derives SSH info from autodl.mjs elastic containers.
Uses rclone copy (safe, no delete) and obscured password via env, not plaintext.
Offers a --dry-run preview before any real transfer.
Does not execute or call live APIs.
